# agentops_integration_connection (Resource)

An AgentOps integration connection. Connections cannot be updated in place: changing any argument forces a new connection. Credentials are write-only and never returned by the API.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "agentops_integration_connection" "github" {
  provider_key = "github"
  display_name = "GitHub (org)"

  credentials = {
    token = var.github_token # write-only
  }

  metadata = jsonencode({ org = "komodorio" })
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `display_name` (String) Human-readable connection name. Changing this forces a new connection.
- `provider_key` (String) Integration provider key (e.g. the catalog provider identifier). Changing this forces a new connection.

### Optional

- `credentials` (Map of String, Sensitive) Provider credentials as string key/value pairs. Write-only: never returned by the API, so it is not refreshed after creation. Changing this forces a new connection.
- `metadata` (String) Arbitrary connection metadata, encoded as a JSON object (JSON). Changing this forces a new connection.

### Read-Only

- `auth_config_key` (String) Auth configuration key assigned to the connection.
- `created_at` (String) Creation timestamp.
- `created_by` (String) Identifier of the principal that created the connection.
- `credentials_type` (String) Type of credentials backing the connection.
- `external_connection_id` (String) Provider-side connection identifier.
- `id` (String) Integration connection identifier.
- `last_used_at` (String) Timestamp the connection was last used.
- `last_validated_at` (String) Timestamp the connection was last validated.
- `scopes` (List of String) Scopes granted to the connection.
- `status` (String) Connection status.
- `updated_at` (String) Last-update timestamp.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
# Integration connections are imported by their id.
terraform import agentops_integration_connection.github conn_01hxyz
```
